blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 159 ft. Looking ahead, 37 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
